name: Sweet home key holder
description: Blender Python script for 3D print: pill-shaped base and wood panel with hook holes, house block with roof trim and arched window, boolean-union tree canopy, extruded Sweet/Home text, wall-mount holes, CodeFryDev engraving, studio lighting—parented to a rig empty.

name: Yoga Oscar
description: Blender Python script for 3D print: stylized Oscar statuette with yoga pose, lotus base, and engraved 'CodeFryDev' on the back. Created using Blender 4.2 LTS, this model features a dynamic pose with one leg raised and arms in a tree pose, perfect for yoga enthusiasts and film lovers alike.
